title: The Gas-Gas Fruit Terrifies Everyone
description: On pages 4–7, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Smoker, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the gas-gas fruit terrifies everyone.
scene: The scene focuses on the gas-gas fruit terrifies everyone, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Smoker, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ughh... she really got me there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What was your name again...? Uhhh...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Luffy! This must be law's doing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huh?! Oh, right ... they've switched places?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That explains why he's so weak ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And she's so... wait, hold on ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: When you're not at full strength!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What the heck is that guy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Nice!! You sure work quick, frankly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: It suddenly started falling from the sky!!!

summary: The Gas-Gas Fruit Terrifies Everyone. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
